creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Comment on attachment 221861
graphics/libgphoto2: update to 2.5.26

Looks good to me - thanks for submitting.

Happy for you to commit this (at the same time as bug 252960) as long as you have also done build testing on ports which depend on this library:
    devel/gvfs
    graphics/camera
    graphics/camerakit
    graphics/darktable
    graphics/digikam
    graphics/elementary-photos
    graphics/entangle
    graphics/eos-movrec
    graphics/flphoto
    graphics/fusefs-gphotofs
    graphics/gphoto2
    graphics/gtimelapse
    graphics/gtkam
    graphics/kamera
    graphics/py-gphoto2
    graphics/sane-backends
    graphics/shotwell
